C001.evidence: Login form rendered with expected fields

C003.evidence: `/Login?Message=Login+failed` loaded but no visible `Login failed` message was rendered on the login form

C016.evidence: Profile and library sharing rendered for admin

C005.evidence: Restore flow completed sufficiently for exploration; 1 audiobook card(s) visible

C007.evidence: Search accepted input without Blazor error

C008.evidence: Edit form rendered with suggestions and upload controls

C011.evidence: Provided ZIP uploaded with HTTP 200; 1 progress element(s) created

C012.evidence: Sort by name clicked without immediate UI error

C013.evidence: Edited name persisted after save and reload

C014.evidence: RSS action attempted; dialogs: alert: Link copied to clipboard!

C017.evidence: Invalid share code did not crash the app

C018.evidence: Processing was already running or button disabled

C019.evidence: Processing was already running or button disabled

C020.evidence: Logout stayed on `/api/logout` and displayed the Blazor error overlay instead of reaching `/Login`

C022.evidence: Admin Actions section visible to guest

C023.evidence: Route rendered app fallback rather than Swagger/OpenAPI UI

C024.evidence: Not-found text rendered, but the Blazor error overlay was visible on the unknown route

C025.evidence: Mobile screenshots captured for login, library, and profile

findings.title: Logout route leaves Blazor error overlay instead of reaching Login
findings.evidence: Clicking Logout stayed on `/api/logout` and displayed the Blazor error UI overlay instead of navigating to `/Login`.

findings.title: Invalid login failure message is not visible
findings.evidence: The invalid login redirects to `/Login?Message=Login+failed`, but the screenshot and visible text show only the blank login form with no `Login failed` message.

findings.title: Reprocess (No Unzip) disabled
findings.evidence: Processing was already running or button disabled

findings.title: Reprocess (Unzip) disabled
findings.evidence: Processing was already running or button disabled

findings.title: Guest can see Admin Actions
findings.evidence: Admin Actions section visible to guest

findings.title: Swagger not available
findings.evidence: Route rendered app fallback rather than Swagger/OpenAPI UI

findings.title: Unknown routes show the Blazor error overlay
findings.evidence: The not-found text rendered, but the Blazor error UI overlay was visible.
